user_query: I'm planning a family vacation and would like to visit a country with a unique livestock population. Can you provide me with the livestock information, including an image, title, and description? Additionally, fetch the world population data to help me narrow down the options.

TaskList.description: Fetch information about unique livestock populations in different countries, including images, titles, and descriptions.
Retrieve world population data to assist in narrowing down the travel options based on population.
Compile the livestock information and world population data into a presentable format to help the user make a decision.
